title: senecio polyphyllus
intro: Senecio polyphyllus, also known as the broad-leaved ragwort or woolly groundsel, is a plant species in the dandelion family, native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio polyphyllus include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of Senecio polyphyllus, such as tea or infusions, can be made by steeping the plant's leaves in hot water, although its use should be limited due to potential toxicity.
